step.name: draft-x-y-z
step.action: Write the 'I do X for Y so they Z' one-liner. Verify all three slots specific.

step.name: publish-narrowly
step.action: Update LinkedIn headline + website hero + 1 directory profile (Upwork / Codementor / etc.).

step.name: run-search-find-test
step.action: After 14 days, search the X+Y phrase across Google/LinkedIn/relevant directory. Record top-5 rank.

step.name: run-peer-recall-test
step.action: Casual ping ('what do I do these days?') — record paraphrase. ≥3 of 5 specific = pass.

step.name: run-buyer-paraphrase-test
step.action: Search transcripts for outcome Z repeated without prompting; record citation.
